revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: ''''大處神社'''（おおところじんじゃ）は、[[滋賀県]][[高島市]][[マキノ町]]（旧[[高島郡]]マキノ町）にある[[神社]]である...'
revision.text:
'''大處神社'''（おおところじんじゃ）は、[[滋賀県]][[高島市]][[マキノ町]]（旧[[高島郡]]マキノ町）にある[[神社]]である。社格は旧[[郷社]]。
==祭神== *[[大地主命]]
==由緒== [[天智天皇]]の代に創建されたと伝えられ、[[延喜式]]に記載された[[式内社]]である。
==文化財== {{節stub}}
==所在地== *滋賀県高島市マキノ町森西175
==外部リンク== *[http://www.genbu.net/data/oumi/ootokoro_title.htm 大處神社（玄松子）] *[http://www.awaumi.com/index.html awaumi arcadia（淡海アルカディア）]
[[category:滋賀県の神社|おおところしんしや]] [[category:高島市|おおところしんしや]] {{shinto-stub}}

revision.comment: /* 由緒 */ お約束（削除依頼に関して）
revision.text:
'''大處神社'''（おおところじんじゃ）は、[[滋賀県]][[高島市]][[マキノ町]]（旧[[高島郡]]マキノ町）にある[[神社]]である。社格は旧[[郷社]]。
==祭神== *[[大地主命]]
==由緒== [[天智天皇]]の代に創建されたと伝えられ、[[延喜式]]に記載された[[式内社]]である。社伝によると、当社社地及びその周辺において白猪白馬白鶏を供えて御歳神を祀った由縁により、祈念祭に猪を献上する儀式が存在したという。
==文化財== {{節stub}}
==所在地== *滋賀県高島市マキノ町森西175
==外部リンク== *[http://www.genbu.net/data/oumi/ootokoro_title.htm 大處神社（玄松子）] *[http://www.awaumi.com/index.html awaumi arcadia（淡海アルカディア）]
[[category:滋賀県の神社|おおところしんしや]] [[category:高島市|おおところしんしや]] {{shinto-stub}}

{{神社 |名称=大處神社 |画像=[[ファイル:Otokoro-jinja.JPG|center|280px]]
大處神社 正面 |所在地=滋賀県高島市マキノ町森西175 |位置={{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|27|43.03|N|136|1|40.60|E|}} |祭神=大地主神 |社格=式内社
郷社 |創建=天智9年創建 |例祭=[[4月22日]] |神事= }} '''大處神社'''（おおところじんじゃ）は、[[滋賀県]][[高島市]]マキノ町森西にある[[神社]]である。社格は旧[[郷社]]。 ==祭神== *[[大地主神]] ==由緒== :[[天智天皇]]の代に創建されたと伝えられ、[[延喜式]]に記載された[[式内社]]である。社伝によると、当社社地及びその周辺において白猪白馬白鶏を供えて御歳神を祀った由縁により、祈年祭に猪を献上する儀式が存在したという。大處郷の惣社である。 ==社家== :峯森氏 ==文化財== {{節stub}} ==所在地＆アクセス== * 滋賀県高島市マキノ町森西175 * [[西日本旅客鉄道|JR]][[マキノ駅]]より[[湖国バス]] 森西バス停下車 徒歩1分 {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおところしんしや}} [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]]

{{神社 |名称 = 大處神社 |画像 = [[ファイル:Otokoro-jinja.JPG|center|250px]]
大處神社 正面 |所在地 = [[滋賀県]][[高島市]]マキノ町森西175 | 緯度度 = 35 | 緯度分 = 27 | 緯度秒 = 43.03 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 136 |経度分 = 01 | 経度秒 = 40.60 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP | 地図 = Japan Shiga | ラベル位置 = left |祭神 = [[大地主神]] |社格 = [[式内社]]
旧[[郷社]] |創建 = 670年（[[天智天皇]]9年） |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = 例祭（[[4月22日]]） |神事 = }} '''大處神社'''（おおところじんじゃ）は、[[滋賀県]][[高島市]][[マキノ町]]森西にある[[神社]]。[[式内社]]で、[[旧社格]]は[[郷社]]。 ==祭神== *[[大地主神]] ==歴史== 670年（[[天智天皇]]9年）に創建されたとされ、[[延喜式神名帳]]に記載された[[式内社]]である[http://www.tree-flower.jp/25/ootokoro_jinja_1103/ootokoro_katsura.html 大處神社のカツラ - 巨樹と花のページ]2019年2月26日　閲覧。社伝によると、当社社地及びその周辺において白猪白馬白鶏を供えて御歳神を祀った由縁により、祈年祭に猪を献上する儀式が存在したという。社家は峯森氏が務め、高島郡十郷の一つである大處郷の惣社であった。 == 現地情報 == ;所在地 *[[滋賀県]][[高島市]][[マキノ町]]森西175 ;交通アクセス * 最寄駅：JR[[湖西線]][[マキノ駅]]より[[湖国バス]] 森西バス停下車 徒歩1分 == 脚注 == === 出典 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} ==外部リンク== *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1319 大處神社 - 滋賀県神社庁] {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおところしんしや}} [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]]

{{nihongo|'''Ōtokoro Shrine'''|大處神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ōtokoro Shrine'''|大處神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ōtokoro Shrine'''|大處神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ōtokoro Shrine'''|大處神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ōtokoro Shrine'''|大處神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ōtokoro Shrine'''|大處神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ōtokoro Shrine'''|大處神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ōtokoro Shrine'''|大處神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

revision.comment: 17 revisions imported
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 大處神社 |画像 = [[ファイル:Otokoro-jinja.JPG|250px]]
鳥居 |所在地 = [[滋賀県]][[高島市]]マキノ町森西175 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[大地主神]] |社格 = [[式内社]]
旧[[郷社]] |創建 = 670年（[[天智天皇]]9年） |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = 例祭（[[4月22日]]） |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=大處神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''大處神社'''（おおところじんじゃ）は、[[滋賀県]][[高島市]][[マキノ町]]森西にある[[神社]]。[[式内社]]で、[[旧社格]]は[[郷社]]。 ==祭神== *[[大地主神]] ==歴史== 670年（[[天智天皇]]9年）に創建されたとされ、[[延喜式神名帳]]に記載された[[式内社]]である[http://www.tree-flower.jp/25/ootokoro_jinja_1103/ootokoro_katsura.html 大處神社のカツラ - 巨樹と花のページ]2019年2月26日　閲覧。社伝によると、当社社地及びその周辺において白猪白馬白鶏を供えて御歳神を祀った由縁により、祈年祭に猪を献上する儀式が存在したという。社家は峯森氏が務め、高島郡十郷の一つである大處郷の惣社であった。 == 現地情報 == ;所在地 *[[滋賀県]][[高島市]][[マキノ町]]森西175 ;交通アクセス * 最寄駅：JR[[湖西線]][[マキノ駅]]より[[湖国バス]] 森西バス停下車 徒歩1分 == 脚注 == === 出典 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} ==外部リンク== *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1319 大處神社 - 滋賀県神社庁] {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおところしんしや}} [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]]

link|Q11438780}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 大處神社 |画像 = [[ファイル:Otokoro-jinja.JPG|250px]]
鳥居 |所在地 = {{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|高島市|Q845794}}マキノ町森西175 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|大地主神}} |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}
旧{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}} |創建 = 670年（{{jalink|天智天皇|Q314802}}9年） |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = 例祭（{{jalink|4月22日|Q2526}}） |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=大處神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''大處神社'''（おおところじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|高島市|Q845794}}{{jalink|マキノ町|Q6739696}}森西にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|式内社}}で、{{jalink|旧社格}}は{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}。 ===祭神=== *{{jalink|大地主神}} ===歴史=== 670年（{{jalink|天智天皇|Q314802}}9年）に創建されたとされ、{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}に記載された{{jalink|式内社}}である[http://www.tree-flower.jp/25/ootokoro_jinja_1103/ootokoro_katsura.html 大處神社のカツラ - 巨樹と花のページ]2019年2月26日　閲覧。社伝によると、当社社地及びその周辺において白猪白馬白鶏を供えて御歳神を祀った由縁により、祈年祭に猪を献上する儀式が存在したという。社家は峯森氏が務め、高島郡十郷の一つである大處郷の惣社であった。 === 現地情報 === ;所在地 *{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|高島市|Q845794}}{{jalink|マキノ町|Q6739696}}森西175 ;交通アクセス * 最寄駅：JR{{jalink|湖西線|Q599974}}{{jalink|マキノ駅|Q5363830}}より{{jalink|湖国バス|Q11563223}} 森西バス停下車 徒歩1分 === 脚注 === === 出典 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} ===外部リンク=== *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1319 大處神社 - 滋賀県神社庁] {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおところしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]]

旧{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}} |創建 = 670年（{{jalink|天智天皇|Q314802}}9年） |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = 例祭（{{jalink|4月22日|Q2526}}） |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=大處神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''大處神社'''（おおところじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|高島市|Q845794}}{{jalink|マキノ町|Q6739696}}森西にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|式内社}}で、{{jalink|旧社格}}は{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}。 ===祭神=== *{{jalink|大地主神}} ===歴史=== 670年（{{jalink|天智天皇|Q314802}}9年）に創建されたとされ、{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}に記載された{{jalink|式内社}}である[http://www.tree-flower.jp/25/ootokoro_jinja_1103/ootokoro_katsura.html 大處神社のカツラ - 巨樹と花のページ]2019年2月26日　閲覧。社伝によると、当社社地及びその周辺において白猪白馬白鶏を供えて御歳神を祀った由縁により、祈年祭に猪を献上する儀式が存在したという。社家は峯森氏が務め、高島郡十郷の一つである大處郷の惣社であった。 === 現地情報 === ;所在地 *{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|高島市|Q845794}}{{jalink|マキノ町|Q6739696}}森西175 ;交通アクセス * 最寄駅：JR{{jalink|湖西線|Q599974}}{{jalink|マキノ駅|Q5363830}}より{{jalink|湖国バス|Q11563223}} 森西バス停下車 徒歩1分 === 脚注 === === 出典 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} ===外部リンク=== *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1319 大處神社 - 滋賀県神社庁] {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおところしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:need translation]]

name in kana (P1814) == * おおところじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 8160005007570 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県高島市マキノ町森西175', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:大處神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11438780}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 大處神社 |画像 = [[ファイル:Otokoro-jinja.JPG|250px]]
鳥居 |所在地 = {{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|高島市|Q845794}}マキノ町森西175 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|大地主神}} |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}
旧{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}} |創建 = 670年（{{jalink|天智天皇|Q314802}}9年） |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = 例祭（{{jalink|4月22日|Q2526}}） |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=大處神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''大處神社'''（おおところじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|高島市|Q845794}}{{jalink|マキノ町|Q6739696}}森西にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|式内社}}で、{{jalink|旧社格}}は{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}。 ===祭神=== *{{jalink|大地主神}} ===歴史=== 670年（{{jalink|天智天皇|Q314802}}9年）に創建されたとされ、{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}に記載された{{jalink|式内社}}である[http://www.tree-flower.jp/25/ootokoro_jinja_1103/ootokoro_katsura.html 大處神社のカツラ - 巨樹と花のページ]2019年2月26日　閲覧。社伝によると、当社社地及びその周辺において白猪白馬白鶏を供えて御歳神を祀った由縁により、祈年祭に猪を献上する儀式が存在したという。社家は峯森氏が務め、高島郡十郷の一つである大處郷の惣社であった。 === 現地情報 === ;所在地 *{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|高島市|Q845794}}{{jalink|マキノ町|Q6739696}}森西175 ;交通アクセス * 最寄駅：JR{{jalink|湖西線|Q599974}}{{jalink|マキノ駅|Q5363830}}より{{jalink|湖国バス|Q11563223}} 森西バス停下車 徒歩1分 === 脚注 === === 出典 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} ===外部リンク=== *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1319 大處神社 - 滋賀県神社庁] {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおところしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:need translation]]

name in kana (P1814) == * おおところじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 8160005007570 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県高島市マキノ町森西175', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:大處神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11438780}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 大處神社 |画像 = [[ファイル:Otokoro-jinja.JPG|250px]]
鳥居 |所在地 = {{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|高島市|Q845794}}マキノ町森西175 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|大地主神}} |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}
旧{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}} |創建 = 670年（{{jalink|天智天皇|Q314802}}9年） |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = 例祭（{{jalink|4月22日|Q2526}}） |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=大處神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''大處神社'''（おおところじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|高島市|Q845794}}{{jalink|マキノ町|Q6739696}}森西にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|式内社}}で、{{jalink|旧社格}}は{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}。 ===祭神=== *{{jalink|大地主神}} ===歴史=== 670年（{{jalink|天智天皇|Q314802}}9年）に創建されたとされ、{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}に記載された{{jalink|式内社}}である[http://www.tree-flower.jp/25/ootokoro_jinja_1103/ootokoro_katsura.html 大處神社のカツラ - 巨樹と花のページ]2019年2月26日　閲覧。社伝によると、当社社地及びその周辺において白猪白馬白鶏を供えて御歳神を祀った由縁により、祈年祭に猪を献上する儀式が存在したという。社家は峯森氏が務め、高島郡十郷の一つである大處郷の惣社であった。 === 現地情報 === ;所在地 *{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|高島市|Q845794}}{{jalink|マキノ町|Q6739696}}森西175 ;交通アクセス * 最寄駅：JR{{jalink|湖西線|Q599974}}{{jalink|マキノ駅|Q5363830}}より{{jalink|湖国バス|Q11563223}} 森西バス停下車 徒歩1分 === 脚注 === === 出典 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} ===外部リンク=== *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1319 大處神社 - 滋賀県神社庁] {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおところしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:need translation]]

name in kana (P1814) == * おおところじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 8160005007570 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県高島市マキノ町森西175', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:大處神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11438780}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 大處神社 |画像 = [[ファイル:Otokoro-jinja.JPG|250px]]
鳥居 |所在地 = {{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|高島市|Q845794}}マキノ町森西175 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|大地主神}} |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}
旧{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}} |創建 = 670年（{{jalink|天智天皇|Q314802}}9年） |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = 例祭（{{jalink|4月22日|Q2526}}） |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=大處神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''大處神社'''（おおところじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|高島市|Q845794}}{{jalink|マキノ町|Q6739696}}森西にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|式内社}}で、{{jalink|旧社格}}は{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}。 ===祭神=== *{{jalink|大地主神}} ===歴史=== 670年（{{jalink|天智天皇|Q314802}}9年）に創建されたとされ、{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}に記載された{{jalink|式内社}}である[http://www.tree-flower.jp/25/ootokoro_jinja_1103/ootokoro_katsura.html 大處神社のカツラ - 巨樹と花のページ]2019年2月26日　閲覧。社伝によると、当社社地及びその周辺において白猪白馬白鶏を供えて御歳神を祀った由縁により、祈年祭に猪を献上する儀式が存在したという。社家は峯森氏が務め、高島郡十郷の一つである大處郷の惣社であった。 === 現地情報 === ;所在地 *{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|高島市|Q845794}}{{jalink|マキノ町|Q6739696}}森西175 ;交通アクセス * 最寄駅：JR{{jalink|湖西線|Q599974}}{{jalink|マキノ駅|Q5363830}}より{{jalink|湖国バス|Q11563223}} 森西バス停下車 徒歩1分 === 脚注 === === 出典 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} ===外部リンク=== *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1319 大處神社 - 滋賀県神社庁] {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおところしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:need translation]]

link|Q11438780}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ōtokoro Shrine |画像 = [[ファイル:Otokoro-jinja.JPG|250px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}{{jalink|Takashima, Shiga|Q845794}} Makino-chō Morinishi 175 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Ōtojinushi-no-Kami}} |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}
former {{jalink|Gōsha|Q134917316}} |創建 = 670 ({{jalink|Emperor Tenji|Q314802}} 9) |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = Annual festival ({{jalink|April 22|Q2526}}) |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Ōtokoro Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Ōtokoro Shrine''' (おおところじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in Morinishi, {{jalink|Makino-chō|Q6739696}}, {{jalink|Takashima, Shiga|Q845794}}, {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}. It is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}, and its {{jalink|former shrine rank}} was {{jalink|Gōsha|Q134917316}}. === Enshrined deity === *{{jalink|Ōtojinushi-no-Kami}} === History === It is said to have been founded in 670 (9th year of {{jalink|Emperor Tenji|Q314802}}), and is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} listed in the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}[http://www.tree-flower.jp/25/ootokoro_jinja_1103/ootokoro_katsura.html 大處神社のカツラ - 巨樹と花のページ] Accessed February 26, 2019. According to shrine tradition, because white boar, white horse, and white chicken were offered in this shrine land and nearby area to worship Toshigami, there was a rite of offering boar at the Kinensai festival. The Mine-mori family served as the shrine household, and it was the sōsha of Ōtokoro-go, one of the ten villages of Takashima District. === Local information === ;Location *{{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}{{jalink|Takashima, Shiga|Q845794}}{{jalink|Makino-chō|Q6739696}} Morinishi 175 ;Access * Nearest station: 1 minute on foot from Morinishi bus stop on {{jalink|Kokoku Bus|Q11563223}}, from {{jalink|Makino Station|Q5363830}} on JR {{jalink|Kosei Line|Q599974}} === Notes === === References === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} ===External links=== *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1319 大處神社 - 滋賀県神社庁] {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおところしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:need translation]]

Torii |所在地 = {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}{{jalink|Takashima, Shiga|Q845794}} Makino-chō Morinishi 175 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Ōtojinushi-no-Kami}} |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}
former {{jalink|Gōsha|Q134917316}} |創建 = 670 ({{jalink|Emperor Tenji|Q314802}} 9) |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = Annual festival ({{jalink|April 22|Q2526}}) |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Ōtokoro Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Ōtokoro Shrine''' (おおところじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in Morinishi, {{jalink|Makino-chō|Q6739696}}, {{jalink|Takashima, Shiga|Q845794}}, {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}. It is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}, and its {{jalink|former shrine rank}} was {{jalink|Gōsha|Q134917316}}. === Enshrined deity === *{{jalink|Ōtojinushi-no-Kami}} === History === It is said to have been founded in 670 (9th year of {{jalink|Emperor Tenji|Q314802}}), and is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} listed in the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}[http://www.tree-flower.jp/25/ootokoro_jinja_1103/ootokoro_katsura.html 大處神社のカツラ - 巨樹と花のページ] Accessed February 26, 2019. According to shrine tradition, because white boar, white horse, and white chicken were offered in this shrine land and nearby area to worship Toshigami, there was a rite of offering boar at the Kinensai festival. The Mine-mori family served as the shrine household, and it was the sōsha of Ōtokoro-go, one of the ten villages of Takashima District. === Local information === ;Location *{{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}{{jalink|Takashima, Shiga|Q845794}}{{jalink|Makino-chō|Q6739696}} Morinishi 175 ;Access * Nearest station: 1 minute on foot from Morinishi bus stop on {{jalink|Kokoku Bus|Q11563223}}, from {{jalink|Makino Station|Q5363830}} on JR {{jalink|Kosei Line|Q599974}} === Notes === === References === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} ===External links=== *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1319 大處神社 - 滋賀県神社庁] {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおところしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:need translation]]

Ollama and DeepSeek were too bad to actually use. see categorization since some of them are very questionable, especially if there was a massive decrease in page size or the {{jawiki| template is minimal or absent on the page

former {{jalink|Gōsha|Q134917316}} |創建 = 670 ({{jalink|Emperor Tenji|Q314802}} 9) |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = Annual festival ({{jalink|April 22|Q2526}}) |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Ōtokoro Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Ōtokoro Shrine''' (おおところじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in Morinishi, {{jalink|Makino-chō|Q6739696}}, {{jalink|Takashima, Shiga|Q845794}}, {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}. It is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}, and its {{jalink|former shrine rank}} was {{jalink|Gōsha|Q134917316}}. === Enshrined deity === *{{jalink|Ōtojinushi-no-Kami}} === History === It is said to have been founded in 670 (9th year of {{jalink|Emperor Tenji|Q314802}}), and is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} listed in the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}[http://www.tree-flower.jp/25/ootokoro_jinja_1103/ootokoro_katsura.html 大處神社のカツラ - 巨樹と花のページ] Accessed February 26, 2019. According to shrine tradition, because white boar, white horse, and white chicken were offered in this shrine land and nearby area to worship Toshigami, there was a rite of offering boar at the Kinensai festival. The Mine-mori family served as the shrine household, and it was the sōsha of Ōtokoro-go, one of the ten villages of Takashima District. === Local information === ;Location *{{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}{{jalink|Takashima, Shiga|Q845794}}{{jalink|Makino-chō|Q6739696}} Morinishi 175 ;Access * Nearest station: 1 minute on foot from Morinishi bus stop on {{jalink|Kokoku Bus|Q11563223}}, from {{jalink|Makino Station|Q5363830}} on JR {{jalink|Kosei Line|Q599974}} === Notes === === References === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} ===External links=== *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1319 大處神社 - 滋賀県神社庁] {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおところしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:need translation]]

Torii |所在地 = {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}{{jalink|Takashima, Shiga|Q845794}} Makino-chō Morinishi 175 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Ōtojinushi-no-Kami}} |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}
former {{jalink|Gōsha|Q134917316}} |創建 = 670 ({{jalink|Emperor Tenji|Q314802}} 9) |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = Annual festival ({{jalink|April 22|Q2526}}) |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Ōtokoro Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Ōtokoro Shrine''' (おおところじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in Morinishi, {{jalink|Makino-chō|Q6739696}}, {{jalink|Takashima, Shiga|Q845794}}, {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}. It is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}, and its {{jalink|former shrine rank}} was {{jalink|Gōsha|Q134917316}}. === Enshrined deity === *{{jalink|Ōtojinushi-no-Kami}} === History === It is said to have been founded in 670 (9th year of {{jalink|Emperor Tenji|Q314802}}), and is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} listed in the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}[http://www.tree-flower.jp/25/ootokoro_jinja_1103/ootokoro_katsura.html 大處神社のカツラ - 巨樹と花のページ] Accessed February 26, 2019. According to shrine tradition, because white boar, white horse, and white chicken were offered in this shrine land and nearby area to worship Toshigami, there was a rite of offering boar at the Kinensai festival. The Mine-mori family served as the shrine household, and it was the sōsha of Ōtokoro-go, one of the ten villages of Takashima District. === Local information === ;Location *{{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}{{jalink|Takashima, Shiga|Q845794}}{{jalink|Makino-chō|Q6739696}} Morinishi 175 ;Access * Nearest station: 1 minute on foot from Morinishi bus stop on {{jalink|Kokoku Bus|Q11563223}}, from {{jalink|Makino Station|Q5363830}} on JR {{jalink|Kosei Line|Q599974}} === Notes === === References === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} ===External links=== *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1319 大處神社 - 滋賀県神社庁] {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおところしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]]

name in kana (P1814) == * おおところじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 8160005007570 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県高島市マキノ町森西175', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:大處神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11438780}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ōtokoro Shrine |画像 = [[ファイル:Otokoro-jinja.JPG|250px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}{{jalink|Takashima, Shiga|Q845794}} Makino-chō Morinishi 175 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Ōtojinushi-no-Kami}} |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}
former {{jalink|Gōsha|Q134917316}} |創建 = 670 ({{jalink|Emperor Tenji|Q314802}} 9) |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = Annual festival ({{jalink|April 22|Q2526}}) |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Ōtokoro Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Ōtokoro Shrine''' (おおところじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in Morinishi, {{jalink|Makino-chō|Q6739696}}, {{jalink|Takashima, Shiga|Q845794}}, {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}. It is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}, and its {{jalink|former shrine rank}} was {{jalink|Gōsha|Q134917316}}. === Enshrined deity === *{{jalink|Ōtojinushi-no-Kami}} === History === It is said to have been founded in 670 (9th year of {{jalink|Emperor Tenji|Q314802}}), and is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} listed in the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}[http://www.tree-flower.jp/25/ootokoro_jinja_1103/ootokoro_katsura.html 大處神社のカツラ - 巨樹と花のページ] Accessed February 26, 2019. According to shrine tradition, because white boar, white horse, and white chicken were offered in this shrine land and nearby area to worship Toshigami, there was a rite of offering boar at the Kinensai festival. The Mine-mori family served as the shrine household, and it was the sōsha of Ōtokoro-go, one of the ten villages of Takashima District. === Local information === ;Location *{{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}{{jalink|Takashima, Shiga|Q845794}}{{jalink|Makino-chō|Q6739696}} Morinishi 175 ;Access * Nearest station: 1 minute on foot from Morinishi bus stop on {{jalink|Kokoku Bus|Q11563223}}, from {{jalink|Makino Station|Q5363830}} on JR {{jalink|Kosei Line|Q599974}} === Notes === === References === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} ===External links=== *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1319 大處神社 - 滋賀県神社庁] {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおところしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]][[Category:qq]]

name in kana (P1814) == * おおところじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 8160005007570 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県高島市マキノ町森西175', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:大處神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11438780}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ōtokoro Shrine |画像 = [[ファイル:Otokoro-jinja.JPG|250px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}{{jalink|Takashima, Shiga|Q845794}} Makino-chō Morinishi 175 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Ōtojinushi-no-Kami}} |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}
former {{jalink|Gōsha|Q134917316}} |創建 = 670 ({{jalink|Emperor Tenji|Q314802}} 9) |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = Annual festival ({{jalink|April 22|Q2526}}) |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Ōtokoro Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Ōtokoro Shrine''' (おおところじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in Morinishi, {{jalink|Makino-chō|Q6739696}}, {{jalink|Takashima, Shiga|Q845794}}, {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}. It is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}, and its {{jalink|former shrine rank}} was {{jalink|Gōsha|Q134917316}}. === Enshrined deity === *{{jalink|Ōtojinushi-no-Kami}} === History === It is said to have been founded in 670 (9th year of {{jalink|Emperor Tenji|Q314802}}), and is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} listed in the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}[http://www.tree-flower.jp/25/ootokoro_jinja_1103/ootokoro_katsura.html 大處神社のカツラ - 巨樹と花のページ] Accessed February 26, 2019. According to shrine tradition, because white boar, white horse, and white chicken were offered in this shrine land and nearby area to worship Toshigami, there was a rite of offering boar at the Kinensai festival. The Mine-mori family served as the shrine household, and it was the sōsha of Ōtokoro-go, one of the ten villages of Takashima District. === Local information === ;Location *{{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}{{jalink|Takashima, Shiga|Q845794}}{{jalink|Makino-chō|Q6739696}} Morinishi 175 ;Access * Nearest station: 1 minute on foot from Morinishi bus stop on {{jalink|Kokoku Bus|Q11563223}}, from {{jalink|Makino Station|Q5363830}} on JR {{jalink|Kosei Line|Q599974}} === Notes === === References === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} ===External links=== *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1319 大處神社 - 滋賀県神社庁] {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおところしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

Torii |所在地 = {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}{{jalink|Takashima, Shiga|Q845794}} Makino-chō Morinishi 175 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Ōtojinushi-no-Kami}} |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}
former {{jalink|Gōsha|Q134917316}} |創建 = 670 ({{jalink|Emperor Tenji|Q314802}} 9) |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = Annual festival ({{jalink|April 22|Q2526}}) |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Ōtokoro Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Ōtokoro Shrine''' (おおところじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in Morinishi, {{jalink|Makino-chō|Q6739696}}, {{jalink|Takashima, Shiga|Q845794}}, {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}. It is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}, and its {{jalink|former shrine rank}} was {{jalink|Gōsha|Q134917316}}. === Enshrined deity === *{{jalink|Ōtojinushi-no-Kami}} === History === It is said to have been founded in 670 (9th year of {{jalink|Emperor Tenji|Q314802}}), and is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} listed in the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}[http://www.tree-flower.jp/25/ootokoro_jinja_1103/ootokoro_katsura.html 大處神社のカツラ - 巨樹と花のページ] Accessed February 26, 2019. According to shrine tradition, because white boar, white horse, and white chicken were offered in this shrine land and nearby area to worship Toshigami, there was a rite of offering boar at the Kinensai festival. The Mine-mori family served as the shrine household, and it was the sōsha of Ōtokoro-go, one of the ten villages of Takashima District. === Local information === ;Location *{{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}{{jalink|Takashima, Shiga|Q845794}}{{jalink|Makino-chō|Q6739696}} Morinishi 175 ;Access * Nearest station: 1 minute on foot from Morinishi bus stop on {{jalink|Kokoku Bus|Q11563223}}, from {{jalink|Makino Station|Q5363830}} on JR {{jalink|Kosei Line|Q599974}} === Notes === === References === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} ===External links=== *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1319 大處神社 - 滋賀県神社庁] {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおところしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}} |創建 = 670 ({{ill|lt=Emperor Tenji|Q314802|WD=Q314802}} 9) |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = Annual festival ({{ill|lt=April 22|Q2526|WD=Q2526}}) |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Ōtokoro Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Ōtokoro Shrine''' (おおところじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in Morinishi, {{ill|lt=Makino-chō|Q6739696|WD=Q6739696}}, {{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}. It is a {{ill||lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN}}, and its {{ill||lt=former shrine rank|UNKNOWN}} was {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}}. === Enshrined deity === *{{ill||lt=Ōtojinushi-no-Kami|UNKNOWN}} === History === It is said to have been founded in 670 (9th year of {{ill|lt=Emperor Tenji|Q314802|WD=Q314802}}), and is a {{ill||lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN}} listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}[http://www.tree-flower.jp/25/ootokoro_jinja_1103/ootokoro_katsura.html 大處神社のカツラ - 巨樹と花のページ] Accessed February 26, 2019. According to shrine tradition, because white boar, white horse, and white chicken were offered in this shrine land and nearby area to worship Toshigami, there was a rite of offering boar at the Kinensai festival. The Mine-mori family served as the shrine household, and it was the sōsha of Ōtokoro-go, one of the ten villages of Takashima District. === Local information === ;Location *{{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}{{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794}}{{ill|lt=Makino-chō|Q6739696|WD=Q6739696}} Morinishi 175 ;Access * Nearest station: 1 minute on foot from Morinishi bus stop on {{ill|lt=Kokoku Bus|Q11563223|WD=Q11563223}}, from {{ill|lt=Makino Station|Q5363830|WD=Q5363830}} on JR {{ill|lt=Kosei Line|Q599974|WD=Q599974}} === Notes === === References === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} ===External links=== *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1319 大處神社 - 滋賀県神社庁] {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおところしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

name in kana (P1814) == * おおところじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 8160005007570 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県高島市マキノ町森西175', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:大處神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11438780}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ōtokoro Shrine |画像 = [[ファイル:Otokoro-jinja.JPG|250px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}{{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794}} Makino-chō Morinishi 175 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtojinushi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN}}
former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}} |創建 = 670 ({{ill|lt=Emperor Tenji|Q314802|WD=Q314802}} 9) |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = Annual festival ({{ill|lt=April 22|Q2526|WD=Q2526}}) |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Ōtokoro Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Ōtokoro Shrine''' (おおところじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in Morinishi, {{ill|lt=Makino-chō|Q6739696|WD=Q6739696}}, {{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN}}, and its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=UNKNOWN}} was {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}}. === Enshrined deity === *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtojinushi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}} === History === It is said to have been founded in 670 (9th year of {{ill|lt=Emperor Tenji|Q314802|WD=Q314802}}), and is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN}} listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}[http://www.tree-flower.jp/25/ootokoro_jinja_1103/ootokoro_katsura.html 大處神社のカツラ - 巨樹と花のページ] Accessed February 26, 2019. According to shrine tradition, because white boar, white horse, and white chicken were offered in this shrine land and nearby area to worship Toshigami, there was a rite of offering boar at the Kinensai festival. The Mine-mori family served as the shrine household, and it was the sōsha of Ōtokoro-go, one of the ten villages of Takashima District. === Local information === ;Location *{{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}{{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794}}{{ill|lt=Makino-chō|Q6739696|WD=Q6739696}} Morinishi 175 ;Access * Nearest station: 1 minute on foot from Morinishi bus stop on {{ill|lt=Kokoku Bus|Q11563223|WD=Q11563223}}, from {{ill|lt=Makino Station|Q5363830|WD=Q5363830}} on JR {{ill|lt=Kosei Line|Q599974|WD=Q599974}} === Notes === === References === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} ===External links=== *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1319 大處神社 - 滋賀県神社庁] {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおところしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

name in kana (P1814) == * おおところじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 8160005007570 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県高島市マキノ町森西175', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:大處神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11438780}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ōtokoro Shrine |画像 = [[ファイル:Otokoro-jinja.JPG|250px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}{{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794}} Makino-chō Morinishi 175 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtojinushi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}}
former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}} |創建 = 670 ({{ill|lt=Emperor Tenji|Q314802|WD=Q314802}} 9) |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = Annual festival ({{ill|lt=April 22|Q2526|WD=Q2526}}) |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Ōtokoro Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Ōtokoro Shrine''' (おおところじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in Morinishi, {{ill|lt=Makino-chō|Q6739696|WD=Q6739696}}, {{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}}, and its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=UNKNOWN}} was {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}}. === Enshrined deity === *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtojinushi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}} === History === It is said to have been founded in 670 (9th year of {{ill|lt=Emperor Tenji|Q314802|WD=Q314802}}), and is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}} listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}[http://www.tree-flower.jp/25/ootokoro_jinja_1103/ootokoro_katsura.html 大處神社のカツラ - 巨樹と花のページ] Accessed February 26, 2019. According to shrine tradition, because white boar, white horse, and white chicken were offered in this shrine land and nearby area to worship Toshigami, there was a rite of offering boar at the Kinensai festival. The Mine-mori family served as the shrine household, and it was the sōsha of Ōtokoro-go, one of the ten villages of Takashima District. === Local information === ;Location *{{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}{{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794}}{{ill|lt=Makino-chō|Q6739696|WD=Q6739696}} Morinishi 175 ;Access * Nearest station: 1 minute on foot from Morinishi bus stop on {{ill|lt=Kokoku Bus|Q11563223|WD=Q11563223}}, from {{ill|lt=Makino Station|Q5363830|WD=Q5363830}} on JR {{ill|lt=Kosei Line|Q599974|WD=Q599974}} === Notes === === References === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} ===External links=== *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1319 大處神社 - 滋賀県神社庁] {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおところしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

link|Q11438780}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ōtokoro Shrine |画像 = [[ファイル:Otokoro-jinja.JPG|250px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}{{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794}} Makino-chō Morinishi 175 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtojinushi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}}
former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}} |創建 = 670 ({{ill|lt=Emperor Tenji|Q314802|WD=Q314802}} 9) |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = Annual festival ({{ill|lt=April 22|Q2526|WD=Q2526}}) |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Ōtokoro Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Ōtokoro Shrine''' (おおところじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in Morinishi, {{ill|lt=Makino-chō|Q6739696|WD=Q6739696}}, {{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}}, and its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q712534}} was {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}}. === Enshrined deity === *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtojinushi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}} === History === It is said to have been founded in 670 (9th year of {{ill|lt=Emperor Tenji|Q314802|WD=Q314802}}), and is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}} listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}[http://www.tree-flower.jp/25/ootokoro_jinja_1103/ootokoro_katsura.html 大處神社のカツラ - 巨樹と花のページ] Accessed February 26, 2019. According to shrine tradition, because white boar, white horse, and white chicken were offered in this shrine land and nearby area to worship Toshigami, there was a rite of offering boar at the Kinensai festival. The Mine-mori family served as the shrine household, and it was the sōsha of Ōtokoro-go, one of the ten villages of Takashima District. === Local information === ;Location *{{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}{{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794}}{{ill|lt=Makino-chō|Q6739696|WD=Q6739696}} Morinishi 175 ;Access * Nearest station: 1 minute on foot from Morinishi bus stop on {{ill|lt=Kokoku Bus|Q11563223|WD=Q11563223}}, from {{ill|lt=Makino Station|Q5363830|WD=Q5363830}} on JR {{ill|lt=Kosei Line|Q599974|WD=Q599974}} === Notes === === References === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} ===External links=== *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1319 大處神社 - 滋賀県神社庁] {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおところしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

name in kana (P1814) == * おおところじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 8160005007570 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県高島市マキノ町森西175', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:大處神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11438780}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ōtokoro Shrine |画像 = [[ファイル:Otokoro-jinja.JPG|250px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}{{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794}} Makino-chō Morinishi 175 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtojinushi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}}
former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}} |創建 = 670 ({{ill|lt=Emperor Tenji|Q314802|WD=Q314802}} 9) |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = Annual festival ({{ill|lt=April 22|Q2526|WD=Q2526}}) |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Ōtokoro Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Ōtokoro Shrine''' (おおところじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in Morinishi, {{ill|lt=Makino-chō|Q6739696|WD=Q6739696}}, {{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}}, and its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q712534}} was {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}}. === Enshrined deity === *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtojinushi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}} === History === It is said to have been founded in 670 (9th year of {{ill|lt=Emperor Tenji|Q314802|WD=Q314802}}), and is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}} listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}[http://www.tree-flower.jp/25/ootokoro_jinja_1103/ootokoro_katsura.html 大處神社のカツラ - 巨樹と花のページ] Accessed February 26, 2019. According to shrine tradition, because white boar, white horse, and white chicken were offered in this shrine land and nearby area to worship Toshigami, there was a rite of offering boar at the Kinensai festival. The Mine-mori family served as the shrine household, and it was the sōsha of Ōtokoro-go, one of the ten villages of Takashima District. === Local information === ;Location *{{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}{{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794}}{{ill|lt=Makino-chō|Q6739696|WD=Q6739696}} Morinishi 175 ;Access * Nearest station: 1 minute on foot from Morinishi bus stop on {{ill|lt=Kokoku Bus|Q11563223|WD=Q11563223}}, from {{ill|lt=Makino Station|Q5363830|WD=Q5363830}} on JR {{ill|lt=Kosei Line|Q599974|WD=Q599974}} === Notes === === References === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} ===External links=== *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1319 大處神社 - 滋賀県神社庁] {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおところしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

== name in kana (P1814) == * おおところじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 8160005007570 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県高島市マキノ町森西175', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:大處神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11438780}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ōtokoro Shrine |画像 = [[ファイル:Otokoro-jinja.JPG|250px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794|1=Takashima, Shiga}} Makino-chō Morinishi 175 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtojinushi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}
former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建 = 670 ({{ill|lt=Emperor Tenji|Q314802|WD=Q314802|1=Emperor Tenji}} 9) |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = Annual festival ({{ill|lt=April 22|Q2526|WD=Q2526|1=April 22}}) |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Ōtokoro Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Ōtokoro Shrine''' (おおところじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Morinishi, {{ill|lt=Makino-chō|Q6739696|WD=Q6739696|1=Makino, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794|1=Takashima, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}, and its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|WD=Q712534}} was {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Enshrined deity === *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtojinushi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}} === History === It is said to have been founded in 670 (9th year of {{ill|lt=Emperor Tenji|Q314802|WD=Q314802|1=Emperor Tenji}}), and is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}[http://www.tree-flower.jp/25/ootokoro_jinja_1103/ootokoro_katsura.html 大處神社のカツラ - 巨樹と花のページ] Accessed February 26, 2019. According to shrine tradition, because white boar, white horse, and white chicken were offered in this shrine land and nearby area to worship Toshigami, there was a rite of offering boar at the Kinensai festival. The Mine-mori family served as the shrine household, and it was the sōsha of Ōtokoro-go, one of the ten villages of Takashima District. === Local information === ;Location *{{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794|1=Takashima, Shiga}}{{ill|lt=Makino-chō|Q6739696|WD=Q6739696|1=Makino, Shiga}} Morinishi 175 ;Access * Nearest station: 1 minute on foot from Morinishi bus stop on {{ill|lt=Kokoku Bus|Q11563223|WD=Q11563223|1=Kokoku Bus}}, from {{ill|lt=Makino Station|Q5363830|WD=Q5363830|1=Makino Station (Shiga)}} on JR {{ill|lt=Kosei Line|Q599974|WD=Q599974|1=Kosei Line}} === Notes === === References === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} ===External links=== *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1319 大處神社 - 滋賀県神社庁] {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおところしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建 = 670 ({{ill|lt=Emperor Tenji|Q314802|WD=Q314802|1=Emperor Tenji}} 9) |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = Annual festival ({{ill|lt=April 22|Q2526|WD=Q2526|1=April 22}}) |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Ōtokoro Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Ōtokoro Shrine''' (おおところじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Morinishi, {{ill|lt=Makino-chō|Q6739696|WD=Q6739696|1=Makino, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794|1=Takashima, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}, and its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|WD=Q712534}} was {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Enshrined deity === *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtojinushi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}} === History === It is said to have been founded in 670 (9th year of {{ill|lt=Emperor Tenji|Q314802|WD=Q314802|1=Emperor Tenji}}), and is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}[http://www.tree-flower.jp/25/ootokoro_jinja_1103/ootokoro_katsura.html 大處神社のカツラ - 巨樹と花のページ] Accessed February 26, 2019. According to shrine tradition, because white boar, white horse, and white chicken were offered in this shrine land and nearby area to worship Toshigami, there was a rite of offering boar at the Kinensai festival. The Mine-mori family served as the shrine household, and it was the sōsha of Ōtokoro-go, one of the ten villages of Takashima District. === Local information === ;Location *{{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794|1=Takashima, Shiga}}{{ill|lt=Makino-chō|Q6739696|WD=Q6739696|1=Makino, Shiga}} Morinishi 175 ;Access * Nearest station: 1 minute on foot from Morinishi bus stop on {{ill|lt=Kokoku Bus|Q11563223|WD=Q11563223|1=Kokoku Bus}}, from {{ill|lt=Makino Station|Q5363830|WD=Q5363830|1=Makino Station (Shiga)}} on JR {{ill|lt=Kosei Line|Q599974|WD=Q599974|1=Kosei Line}} === Notes === === References === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} ===External links=== *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1319 大處神社 - 滋賀県神社庁] {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおところしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}, and its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|WD=Q712534}} was {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Enshrined deity === *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtojinushi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}} === History === It is said to have been founded in 670 (9th year of {{ill|lt=Emperor Tenji|Q314802|WD=Q314802|1=Emperor Tenji}}), and is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}[http://www.tree-flower.jp/25/ootokoro_jinja_1103/ootokoro_katsura.html 大處神社のカツラ - 巨樹と花のページ] Accessed February 26, 2019. According to shrine tradition, because white boar, white horse, and white chicken were offered in this shrine land and nearby area to worship Toshigami, there was a rite of offering boar at the Kinensai festival. The Mine-mori family served as the shrine household, and it was the sōsha of Ōtokoro-go, one of the ten villages of Takashima District. === Local information === ;Location *{{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794|1=Takashima, Shiga}}{{ill|lt=Makino-chō|Q6739696|WD=Q6739696|1=Makino, Shiga}} Morinishi 175 ;Access * Nearest station: 1 minute on foot from Morinishi bus stop on {{ill|lt=Kokoku Bus|Q11563223|WD=Q11563223|1=Kokoku Bus}}, from {{ill|lt=Makino Station|Q5363830|WD=Q5363830|1=Makino Station (Shiga)}} on JR {{ill|lt=Kosei Line|Q599974|WD=Q599974|1=Kosei Line}} === Notes === === References === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} ===External links=== *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1319 大處神社 - 滋賀県神社庁] {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおところしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}, and its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|WD=Q712534}} was {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Enshrined deity === *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtojinushi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}} === History === It is said to have been founded in 670 (9th year of {{ill|lt=Emperor Tenji|Q314802|WD=Q314802|1=Emperor Tenji}}), and is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}[http://www.tree-flower.jp/25/ootokoro_jinja_1103/ootokoro_katsura.html 大處神社のカツラ - 巨樹と花のページ] Accessed February 26, 2019. According to shrine tradition, because white boar, white horse, and white chicken were offered in this shrine land and nearby area to worship Toshigami, there was a rite of offering boar at the Kinensai festival. The Mine-mori family served as the shrine household, and it was the sōsha of Ōtokoro-go, one of the ten villages of Takashima District. === Local information === ;Location *{{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794|1=Takashima, Shiga}}{{ill|lt=Makino-chō|Q6739696|WD=Q6739696|1=Makino, Shiga}} Morinishi 175 ;Access * Nearest station: 1 minute on foot from Morinishi bus stop on {{ill|lt=Kokoku Bus|Q11563223|WD=Q11563223|1=Kokoku Bus}}, from {{ill|lt=Makino Station|Q5363830|WD=Q5363830|1=Makino Station (Shiga)}} on JR {{ill|lt=Kosei Line|Q599974|WD=Q599974|1=Kosei Line}} === Notes === === References === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} ===External links=== *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1319 大處神社 - 滋賀県神社庁] {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおところしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]

According to shrine tradition, because white boar, white horse, and white chicken were offered in this shrine land and nearby area to worship Toshigami, there was a rite of offering boar at the Kinensai festival. The Mine-mori family served as the shrine household, and it was the sōsha of Ōtokoro-go, one of the ten villages of Takashima District. === Local information === ;Location *{{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794|1=Takashima, Shiga}}{{ill|lt=Makino-chō|Q6739696|WD=Q6739696|1=Makino, Shiga}} Morinishi 175 ;Access * Nearest station: 1 minute on foot from Morinishi bus stop on {{ill|lt=Kokoku Bus|Q11563223|WD=Q11563223|1=Kokoku Bus}}, from {{ill|lt=Makino Station|Q5363830|WD=Q5363830|1=Makino Station (Shiga)}} on JR {{ill|lt=Kosei Line|Q599974|WD=Q599974|1=Kosei Line}} === Notes === === References === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} ===External links=== *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1319 大處神社 - 滋賀県神社庁] {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]

== name in kana (P1814) == * おおところじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 8160005007570 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県高島市マキノ町森西175', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:大處神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11438780}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ōtokoro Shrine |画像 = [[ファイル:Otokoro-jinja.JPG|250px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794|1=Takashima, Shiga}} Makino-chō Morinishi 175 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtojinushi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}
former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建 = 670 ({{ill|lt=Emperor Tenji|Q314802|WD=Q314802|1=Emperor Tenji}} 9) |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = Annual festival ({{ill|lt=April 22|Q2526|WD=Q2526|1=April 22}}) |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Ōtokoro Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Ōtokoro Shrine''' (おおところじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Morinishi, {{ill|lt=Makino-chō|Q6739696|WD=Q6739696|1=Makino, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794|1=Takashima, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}, and its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|WD=Q712534}} was {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Enshrined deity === *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtojinushi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}} === History === It is said to have been founded in 670 (9th year of {{ill|lt=Emperor Tenji|Q314802|WD=Q314802|1=Emperor Tenji}}), and is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}[http://www.tree-flower.jp/25/ootokoro_jinja_1103/ootokoro_katsura.html 大處神社のカツラ - 巨樹と花のページ] Accessed February 26, 2019. According to shrine tradition, because white boar, white horse, and white chicken were offered in this shrine land and nearby area to worship Toshigami, there was a rite of offering boar at the Kinensai festival. The Mine-mori family served as the shrine household, and it was the sōsha of Ōtokoro-go, one of the ten villages of Takashima District. === Local information === ;Location *{{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794|1=Takashima, Shiga}}{{ill|lt=Makino-chō|Q6739696|WD=Q6739696|1=Makino, Shiga}} Morinishi 175 ;Access * Nearest station: 1 minute on foot from Morinishi bus stop on {{ill|lt=Kokoku Bus|Q11563223|WD=Q11563223|1=Kokoku Bus}}, from {{ill|lt=Makino Station|Q5363830|WD=Q5363830|1=Makino Station (Shiga)}} on JR {{ill|lt=Kosei Line|Q599974|WD=Q599974|1=Kosei Line}} === Notes === === References === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} ===External links=== *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1319 大處神社 - 滋賀県神社庁] {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Takashima, Shiga]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]

== name in kana (P1814) == * おおところじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 8160005007570 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県高島市マキノ町森西175', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:大處神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11438780}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ōtokoro Shrine |画像 = [[ファイル:Otokoro-jinja.JPG|250px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794|1=Takashima, Shiga}} Makino-chō Morinishi 175 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtojinushi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}
former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建 = 670 ({{ill|lt=Emperor Tenji|Q314802|WD=Q314802|1=Emperor Tenji}} 9) |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = Annual festival ({{ill|lt=April 22|Q2526|WD=Q2526|1=April 22}}) |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Ōtokoro Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Ōtokoro Shrine''' (おおところじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Morinishi, {{ill|lt=Makino-chō|Q6739696|WD=Q6739696|1=Makino, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794|1=Takashima, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}, and its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|WD=Q712534}} was {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Enshrined deity === *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtojinushi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}} === History === It is said to have been founded in 670 (9th year of {{ill|lt=Emperor Tenji|Q314802|WD=Q314802|1=Emperor Tenji}}), and is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}[http://www.tree-flower.jp/25/ootokoro_jinja_1103/ootokoro_katsura.html 大處神社のカツラ - 巨樹と花のページ] Accessed February 26, 2019. According to shrine tradition, because white boar, white horse, and white chicken were offered in this shrine land and nearby area to worship Toshigami, there was a rite of offering boar at the Kinensai festival. The Mine-mori family served as the shrine household, and it was the sōsha of Ōtokoro-go, one of the ten villages of Takashima District. === Local information === ;Location *{{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794|1=Takashima, Shiga}}{{ill|lt=Makino-chō|Q6739696|WD=Q6739696|1=Makino, Shiga}} Morinishi 175 ;Access * Nearest station: 1 minute on foot from Morinishi bus stop on {{ill|lt=Kokoku Bus|Q11563223|WD=Q11563223|1=Kokoku Bus}}, from {{ill|lt=Makino Station|Q5363830|WD=Q5363830|1=Makino Station (Shiga)}} on JR {{ill|lt=Kosei Line|Q599974|WD=Q599974|1=Kosei Line}} === Notes === === References === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} ===External links=== *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1319 大處神社 - 滋賀県神社庁] {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Takashima, Shiga]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]]

== name in kana (P1814) == * おおところじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 8160005007570 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県高島市マキノ町森西175', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:大處神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11438780}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ōtokoro Shrine |画像 = [[ファイル:Otokoro-jinja.JPG|250px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794|1=Takashima, Shiga}} Makino-chō Morinishi 175 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtojinushi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}
former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建 = 670 ({{ill|lt=Emperor Tenji|Q314802|WD=Q314802|1=Emperor Tenji}} 9) |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = Annual festival ({{ill|lt=April 22|Q2526|WD=Q2526|1=April 22}}) |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Ōtokoro Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Ōtokoro Shrine''' (おおところじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Morinishi, {{ill|lt=Makino-chō|Q6739696|WD=Q6739696|1=Makino, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794|1=Takashima, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}, and its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|WD=Q712534}} was {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Enshrined deity === *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtojinushi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}} === History === It is said to have been founded in 670 (9th year of {{ill|lt=Emperor Tenji|Q314802|WD=Q314802|1=Emperor Tenji}}), and is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}[http://www.tree-flower.jp/25/ootokoro_jinja_1103/ootokoro_katsura.html 大處神社のカツラ - 巨樹と花のページ] Accessed February 26, 2019. According to shrine tradition, because white boar, white horse, and white chicken were offered in this shrine land and nearby area to worship Toshigami, there was a rite of offering boar at the Kinensai festival. The Mine-mori family served as the shrine household, and it was the sōsha of Ōtokoro-go, one of the ten villages of Takashima District. === Local information === ;Location *{{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794|1=Takashima, Shiga}}{{ill|lt=Makino-chō|Q6739696|WD=Q6739696|1=Makino, Shiga}} Morinishi 175 ;Access * Nearest station: 1 minute on foot from Morinishi bus stop on {{ill|lt=Kokoku Bus|Q11563223|WD=Q11563223|1=Kokoku Bus}}, from {{ill|lt=Makino Station|Q5363830|WD=Q5363830|1=Makino Station (Shiga)}} on JR {{ill|lt=Kosei Line|Q599974|WD=Q599974|1=Kosei Line}} === Notes === === References === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} ===External links=== *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1319 大處神社 - 滋賀県神社庁] {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōtokoro Shrine]][[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Takashima, Shiga]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]]
